## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Senior Full Stack Engineer (ClientOps + Applied AI) role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nicolas has extensive experience in full-stack development, AI engineering, and early-stage startups (including AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Strong alignment with GrowthX's tech stack (Rails, React) and AI-focused product development approach](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Nicolas values fast-paced environments, open communication, and being involved in the full product lifecycle](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)
  - [GrowthX is looking to grow the client ops engineering team to 4-5 people in the near term](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

## Topics

### Nicolas' Background

  - [Started coding at 14, progressed through various technologies (PHP, JavaScript, Node.js)](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Worked at software factory, then Globant, before becoming CTO at CountIt (wellness challenge platform)](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Significant experience at Masterclass, focusing on growth and marketing projects](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - Employee \#1 at AirOps, heavily involved in early AI/LLM integration and product development

### GrowthX Team Structure

  - [Split into platform team (8 people) and client ops engineering team (currently 2-3 people)](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Platform team focuses on AI framework, runtime, and vertical projects](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Client ops team works on client-specific projects, AI workflows, and interfaces with strategists](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Flexible structure allows engineers to contribute across teams as needed](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Tech Stack and Development Approach

  - [AI components run on Temporal with TypeScript](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
  - [Product stack: Rails backend with React frontend](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Heavy use of AI tools in development process (e.g., Cursor for code generation)](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
  - [Moving towards code-based workflow creation instead of visual graph-based systems](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Remote-first with quarterly in-person meetings (aiming for San Francisco office)](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=3255.0)
  - [Emphasis on open communication and fast-paced development](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)
  - [Opportunity to work on diverse client projects and cutting-edge AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to sync internally and follow up with Nicolas within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=3765.0)
  - [Potential start date: 2+ weeks from now, ideally before July 20th team meetup in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=3208.0)
  - [Nicolas to consider any additional questions about contract details for Tucker](https://fathom.video/share/ucez_QDDzk9iMzBGXQzgYR4V5oj1EoVg?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)
